untranslatable_reason: Signal requires 'estimated fundamental value' and 'position conviction based on multiple valuation methods' — these are qualitative/external inputs not available in the allowed indicator set. The price discount condition cannot be operationalized without a fundamental value benchmark. Additionally, the entry condition 'high conviction from multiple valuation methods' has no quantifiable proxy in technical indicators.
translation_notes: Partially translated using available indicators: (1) Entry approximated as price trading at significant discount (close < 0.85x reference), though true fundamental value comparison is not possible. (2) Exit conditions translated: profit target at +10% (returns >= 0.10) and max drawdown stop at -8% (returns <= -0.08) as OR logic. (3) Hold period set to 180 days (6 months max). (4) Direction is LONG based on holding undervalued positions. (5) This signal fundamentally requires external valuation models not expressible in technical indicator syntax.
